pages.text:
INSTRUMENT OF ACCESSION

t.na

Convention relating to International

Exhibitions was done at Paris on 22 November 1928;

WHEREAS

the Convention was amended and supplemented

by the Protocol of 30 November 1972 and the

Amendment of 24

June 1982

AND WHEREAS Article 3 of the above-mentioned Protocol provides to the effect that

the Protocol shall remain

open for

accession;

the

OF THE KINGDOM OF THAILAND, having 1928 Convention, the 1972 Protocol and the 24 June 1982, hereby

accedes to the same and

to faithfully perform and carry stipulations contained therein.

IN

WITNESS

WHEREOF, this Instrument

of Accession is

and sealed by the Minister of

Foreign

Affairs of

signed

Thailand.

DONE at the Ministry of Foreign Affairs, Saranrom

Palace, Bangkok, this Jwenty-ninth. day of December in the Two thousand Five hundred and Thirty-fifth year of the Buddhist Era, corresponding to the

One thousand

Nine hundred

and

Ninety-second year of the Christian Era.

Squadron Leader

Prosonglossen.

(Prasong Soonsiri)

Minister of Foreign Affairs of Thailand

similar_documents.title: Procès-verbal de dépôt de l'instrument d'adhésion
